description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure with a strong build, standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. He has a distinctive mohawk hairstyle and a well-groomed beard. The figure is dressed in a sleeveless athletic tank top, fitted pants, and fingerless gloves, giving him a sporty and urban appearance. He wears high-top sneakers and a utility belt around his waist, suggesting readiness for physical activity or urban exploration. The skin is exposed on the arms and upper chest, showing defined musculature. The overall look is that of a confident, athletic pedestrian suited for a modern city environment.
description: A muscular adult male in athletic wear with a mohawk, fingerless gloves, and high-top sneakers, standing in a T-pose.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muscular build, mohawk hairstyle, sleeveless tank top, gloves, and utility belt clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the mohawk, beard, and the fit of the pants and sneakers.
description_view_2: Back view reveals the back muscles, the tank top's cut, and the rear of the utility belt and sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the arm, glove, and side profile of the face and footwear.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic tank top, fitted pants, fingerless gloves, utility belt
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
